content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to refine the Eternal Dao Seed.

Moreover, he also helped his wife and children to improve their cultivation, and he had accumulated a lot of extradimensional resources in the past, which was enough to improve the cultivation of his relatives.

However, he will not do his best to cultivate the human race, after all, the resources of the Death Void are extremely scarce now, and he must keep a lot of resources.

After all, in the next hundred extradimensional eras, it would be difficult for the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory to completely recover.

Therefore, resources have to be spared a little bit of spending.

Although Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Xiao Yue did not comprehend the true superdimensional power, and their cultivation speed was not fast, with the help of the superdimensional resources given by Ye Tian, they were not far away from condensing the twelfth eternal realm spirit.

After another extradimensional era passed, the three of them broke through one after another, condensing the twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit.

Of course.

If you don't comprehend the true extradimensional power, no matter how many resources you have, it will be difficult to condense the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

Ye Tian didn't expect them to condense the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit in a short period of time.

And to comprehend the power of the extradimensional, then 027 is even more difficult.

Ye Tian couldn't let them comprehend the power of the transcendent dimension now, and could only hope that after stepping out of the territory of No. 7362, he would be able to find some treasures that would assist them in comprehending the power of the transcendent dimension, and assist them in comprehending the power of the transcendent dimension.

Or capture one or more extradimensional elves by yourself and let them slowly become enlightened.

......

"I don't know when the Ice Ghost Organization will arrive, the Extradimensional Storm has passed a Hyperdimensional Era, although the Extradimensional Void is still unstable, forcibly shuttling in at this time, the price paid is very high, but it is difficult to guarantee that the Ice Ghost Organization will not come in. "

Ye Tian is not afraid of the Ice Ghost Organization now, and he is looking forward to the early arrival of the Ice Ghost Organization.

In this way, he would also be able to leave the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory as soon as possible and enter other realms.

Seven thousand three hundred and twenty-two territories.

The extradimensional realm - the Sea of Ice Wind.

Territory 7,322 is different from Territory 7,362, Territory 7,362 is only an extradimensional realm of the Eternal Realm, and the Realm of God and the Demon Seed Abyss are only attached, and the combination of these three can be regarded as an extradimensional (AFBJ) realm, and it can only be regarded as the most ordinary extradimensional realm.

And the Ice Wind Sea is much stronger than the Eternal Realm, it is a very good extra-dimensional realm, and many peak realm gods have been born here, although there is no half-step super-dimensional realm, but the strength is comparable to that of the blood shadow kind of the pinnacle realm.

And somewhere in the Ice Wind Sea, this is a branch of the Ice Ghost Organization, and it is an extremely powerful branch.

The fourth leader of the Ice Ghost Organization, the Wind Rift Realm God, is stationed here, and there are more than 300 Peak Realm Gods under his command, among which there are more than 100 Peak Realm Gods whose strength has reached the kind of Liangyi Realm God.

The Wind Rift Realm God is very powerful, condensing thirteen Eternal Realm Spirits, and also fusing two medium-level extra-dimensional things, with three high-level super-dimensional treasures and one super-dimensional secret treasure.

Any super-dimensional secret treasure is extremely rare.

And.

The Wind Rift Realm God has also undergone a special transformation, and his physical body is second only to the half-step Transcendent Realm, although this transformation has made him lose the hope of advancing to the Transcendent Realm, but it has also gained extremely powerful combat power.

this day.

The Wind Rift Realm God's eyes were slightly Ling, staring at a certain place, and said, "Ziya, come out when you come!"

Airplanes!

However, it was not the true god of the Ziya Realm God who appeared here, but one of its thirds.

Unlike Ye Tian's copied body, the clones of the Ziya Realm God were all refined by him at a huge cost, and their combat power was no less than that of the Split Realm God.

"Ziya, what are you doing here?"

The Wind Rift God was curious.

He was very aware of the importance of the Ziya Realm God in the Ice Ghost Organization, and under normal circumstances, he would not leave his town guard casually, but now he sent a clone over.

Ziya said lightly: "Split, you should still remember the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two, a team was wiped out there, and the fallen Blood Realm God also transmitted some of the information, a peak realm god actually has a large number of super dimensional secret treasures, just those super dimensional secret treasures are worth a lot of money, and a mere peak realm god dares to kill me A member of our ice ghost organization, he must be killed." "

"I know this matter, haven't we discussed it, wait until the extradimensional void of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory is stabilized before it passes, if we go through now, the price we will pay is even greater, and we have to pay an unimaginable price. The Wind Rift God frowned.

Revenge is true, but the loss is too big to be worth it!

The Ziya Realm God said again: "Normally, it would be best for us to go over after ten extradimensional eras, but now there are some special circumstances. "

"What special circumstances?" the Wind Rift God looked puzzled. []

"The Great Leader bid on the Boundary Disk at an auction, and the Boundary Disk is useless for ordinary peak realm gods, but by cooperating with the Domain-Breaking Star Array organized by our Ice Ghost Organization, the price can be reduced by ten or even a hundred times. "

"What, the Great Leader has obtained the Boundary Plate, how come I don't know this information?"

"Because this matter must be kept secret, the great leader has only been obtained for a short time, and in order to successfully take this demarcation plate, he also paid a heavy price to escape. Therefore, the fewer the gods of the realm who know, the fewer they have. Now, I've told you that you're not allowed to leak it out again. Otherwise, once you usher in a half-step transcendent realm, it will be very troublesome!" the Ziya Realm God admonished.

"Understood!"

The Wind Rift God nodded, he also knew that this matter was very important and could not be divulged.

In terms of strength, the Ice Ghost Organization is far inferior to a half-step extradimensional realm, that is, the enemies of the Ice Ghost Organization can't find them, so they can survive for so long.

Several leaders of the Ice Ghost Organization, all of whom wanted to break through to the half-step extradimensional realm, but it was too difficult to break through.

What's more, several of their leaders have transformed their bodies, and it is even more difficult to comprehend the power of the transcendent dimension, not only is there no hope of breaking through the transcendent realm, but even if the difficulty of comprehending the superdimensional power to advance to the half-step transcendent realm is extremely huge.

This is also the reason why they have not yet given birth to a half-step extradimensional realm.

"Then when will you deal with Territory Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two?" the Wind Rift God asked.

"In the past tenth of the extradimensional era, I will do it immediately, and this time, I will send a clone to do it with you, and you must be able to kill the other party. If we let them live, they may be a threat to us. The god of the Tooth Realm said.

"Good!"

The Wind Rift God responded.
